built.title: Fully Built
built.description: Get the Star-A lamp fully assembled and ready to use. Real kinetic outdoor lighting, built by us, for you.

kit.title: Build-It Kit
kit.description: Build the Star-A rising lamp yourself. Complete kit with all parts, electronics, and step-by-step instructions.

parts.title: Replacement Parts
parts.description: Order individual Star-A replacement parts. Every component available separately — no planned obsolescence.

files.title: 3D Print Files
files.description: Download free STL files for the Star-A lamp. Print at home and source the electronics yourself.

about.description: Learn about Dornori — the team, the story, and the Star-A lamp that started it all.

mission-statement.description: Why Dornori exists — building things together, outdoors, with real components.
